plan.failureSummary: The page.ai tool failed in DETERMINISTIC mode because it attempted to interact with a 'Last Name' field that no longer exists in the current UI (Set 2).
observedIndicators: UI mismatch: screenshot shows 'Your Name' but tool tried to find 'Last Name'
Historical flakiness indicates a rotating or unstable UI structure

remediationSteps.summary: Clear cache and retry to allow autonomous adaptation.
remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai cache and re-run the test. This will force the autonomous agent to re-analyze the page and adapt to the 'Set 2' form layout.

remediationSteps.summary: Evaluate the use of DETERMINISTIC mode for this unstable UI.
remediationSteps.details: If this survey frequently rotates between sets, consider running this specific test without deterministic mode, or ensure the cache is robust enough to handle both variations if possible.

plan.notes: The application appears to be serving different form versions (evidenced by the 'Set 2' badge in the failure screenshot). The cached automation expects a 'Last Name' field, but the current page version only has 'Your Name'. Clearing the cache will allow the autonomous agent to adapt to the current form structure.
